title: Generic U.S. business-credit pathway (structured KB)
disclaimer: General information only — NOT legal, tax, or financial advice. Verify every step against the official source and consult a licensed professional. No founder PII.
principle: A business builds credit under its OWN identity (entity + EIN + D-U-N-S) so the business credit bureaus track it SEPARATELY from the owner's personal credit. The mechanism is a real, verifiable on-time payment history under the business's identity — there is no legitimate shortcut.

steps.title: State-registered entity in good standing
steps.why: A business needs a distinct legal identity before it can have its own credit. Good standing (reports filed, fees paid) is what vendors/bureaus check.

steps.title: EIN (federal tax ID)
steps.why: The business's federal identifier; needed for banking, taxes, bureaus, vendors. Free from the IRS. NOT a personal-credit workaround.

steps.title: Dedicated business bank account
steps.why: Backbone of separation (no commingling) and a prerequisite vendors/lenders expect.

steps.title: Business street address + listed phone (NAP)
steps.why: Consistent name/address/phone is what bureaus and vendors match on; mismatches cause verification failures.

steps.title: D-U-N-S number
steps.why: Opens the D&B file; scores like PAYDEX key off it. Free to request — do not imply payment is required.

steps.source: each vendor directly (confirm it reports + to which bureau)
steps.title: Net-30 starter vendor tradelines
steps.why: Reporting vendor accounts (e.g. office/industrial suppliers) build the file. Always verify a vendor currently reports — relationships change.
steps.guardrail: REAL accounts the business actually buys from and pays. No rented/seasoned tradelines.

steps.title: 3-6 months on-time payment history
steps.why: Consistent on-time/early payments build the positive file. Time + real payments are the mechanism; no shortcut.

steps.title: Revolving business credit (store then general cards)
steps.why: Broadens credit mix and available capital under the business name; personal-guarantee reliance tends to decrease over time.

steps.source: Secretary of State + the business bureaus
steps.title: Maintain good standing + on-time payments + monitoring
steps.why: Lapses in good standing or late payments damage the file the pathway built.
